onboarding.question: How will you be using the platform?
onboarding.autonomousDesc: I'm a physician in private practice, seeing patients on my own.
onboarding.institutionalDesc: I work at a clinic, hospital, or public health service as part of a team.
onboarding.autonomousIntro: Let's set up your practice profile. Next, you'll add your medical license, specialty, and contact details.
onboarding.needInviteDesc: Your unit manager needs to send you an email invitation to link your account. Once you receive it, just open the invitation link.
onboarding.errorDesc: We couldn't create your profile. Please try again.

auth.appTagline: Clinical intelligence for the diagnosis and management of Gestational Diabetes Mellitus.
auth.previewCta: Just want to preview what's already built?
auth.recoverSubtitle: Enter your email to receive a recovery link
auth.recoverySent: If this email is registered, you will receive a link to reset your password. Check your inbox and spam folder.
auth.firstAccessSubtitle: Welcome! Create a password to access the system.
auth.linkExpiredTitle: This recovery link has expired or is invalid.
auth.linkExpiredDesc: Request a new link to reset your password.
auth.updatePasswordError: Error updating password. Please try again.
auth.googleNotRegistered: This Google email is not registered. Please request access from the administrator.
auth.googleSignInFailed: Could not start sign-in with Google. Please try again.
auth.passwordMustBeDifferent: The new password must be different from your current password. Please choose another.
auth.passwordBreached: This password appears in public data breaches. Please choose a stronger password.
auth.passwordTooShort: The password does not meet the minimum length requirements.
auth.passwordMinLength: The password must be at least 6 characters.

profissional_inativo_30d.descricao: Professional-plan practitioners inactive in the last month

intermediaria_inativo_30d.descricao: Intermediate-plan practitioners inactive in the last month

inicial_inativo_30d.descricao: Initial-plan practitioners inactive in the last month

unidade_dormente.titulo: Units with no active practitioners this month
unidade_dormente.descricao: Units with no practitioner activity in the last 30 days

onboarding_travado.titulo: Sign-ups 7+ days old with incomplete profile
onboarding_travado.descricao: Practitioners registered over 7 days ago with an incomplete profile

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Near real-time system snapshot.
overview.cardProfessionalsTip: All practitioners registered on the platform — private practice and institutional, active and inactive.
overview.cardUnitsTip: Registered institutional health units (health centers, hospitals, clinics, etc.).
overview.cardPatientsTip: All-time total of patients registered in the system. Comes from the aggregated view — admins don't access individual clinical data.
overview.cardReportsTip: All-time total of reports issued by MARI. Each report matches a completed consultation.
overview.alertsDesc: Signals that deserve the operation's attention.
overview.alertsTip: Count of operational signals (overdue payments, exceeded quotas, inactive accounts, etc.) over the full base — ignores the filters below.
overview.analysisDesc: Filter by period, region and account type. The totals and alerts above always consider the full base.
overview.evolDesc: Separate comparison between private-practice practitioners (individual subscribers) and institutional ones (linked to a unit).
overview.evolConsultorioDesc: Individual subscribers of the Initial, Intermediate and Professional plans.
overview.evolConsultorioTip: Only practitioners WITHOUT an institutional unit link. New = registered in the month. Active = with at least one activity (patient, consultation, report or birth) in the month.
overview.evolInstitucionalDesc: Practitioners linked to units (health centers, hospitals, contracting clinics).
overview.evolInstitucionalTip: Only practitioners WITH a link to an institutional unit. New = registered in the month. Active = with at least one activity in the month.
overview.byPlanTip: Distribution of active private-practice practitioners by contracted plan (Initial, Intermediate, Professional).
overview.unitsByTypeTip: Distribution of registered units by category (health center, hospital, clinic, etc.), considering the selected region filters.
overview.planEvolDesc: New private-practice practitioners by plan (Initial, Intermediate, Professional) over the last 12 months.
overview.planEvolTip: Monthly subscriptions of the commercial private-practice plans. Institutional accounts are not in this series — they're contracted per unit.
overview.byCountryTip: Private-practice practitioners (no unit link) by country, with the percentage of the total. Institutional practitioners appear in the by-unit tables.
overview.byStateTip: Private-practice practitioners (no unit link) by state, with the percentage of the country total.
overview.topCitiesTip: Ranking of the 20 cities with the most private-practice practitioners (no unit link).
overview.profByUnitTip: Practitioners linked to units (institutional), grouped by the unit where they work.
overview.patByUnitDesc: Cumulative history of patients and reports generated per unit.
overview.consultorioGroupDesc: Metrics for independent practitioners — commercial plans, geographic distribution and city ranking.
overview.institutionalGroupDesc: Metrics for contracting units — health centers, hospitals and clinics — and their linked practitioners.

groupScope.institucionalSub: Practitioners linked to health centers, hospitals and clinics.

reenviarConvite.title: Resend invitation
reenviarConvite.description: A new magic link will be sent.
reenviarConvite.descriptionToEmail: A new magic link will be sent to {{email}}.
reenviarConvite.userAlreadyActive: The user has already activated the account. List updated.

cadastrarGestorGeral.title: Register general manager
cadastrarGestorGeral.description: They will receive an email to set a password and access the consolidator.
cadastrarGestorGeral.contratantesHint: You can register the manager without linking clients now and do it later via the Edit button.
cadastrarGestorGeral.successNoContratantes: General manager registered! Email sent. Link clients when you're ready.
cadastrarGestorGeral.successWithContratantes: General manager registered! Email sent. {{count}} client linked.
cadastrarGestorGeral.successWithContratantes_other: General manager registered! Email sent. {{count}} clients linked.

profissionais.paymentsPlaceholder: Payment history will be shown here after the Asaas integration. For now, check directly in the Asaas panel.
profissionais.reactivateDesc: The professional regains access to MARI. Plan and report limit are preserved as they were. The professional needs to log in again. If the Asaas subscription is canceled, remember to reactivate it there as well.

feedbacks.title: Feedback
feedbacks.subtitle: Messages sent by users from their profile.
feedbacks.empty: No feedback found with these filters.
feedbacks.ccNote: (With a copy to the unit management.)
feedbacks.ccNoteWithUnit: (With a copy to the unit management — {{unidade}}.)
feedbacks.emailIntro: Thank you for contacting MARI support. Please find our reply below.
feedbacks.emailSignature: MARI Team — Diagnosis and Management of Gestational Diabetes Mellitus
feedbacks.noGestorInfo: Institutional feedback with no manager registered for the unit — sent without a copy.

desativarGestorGeral.title: Deactivate general manager
desativarGestorGeral.descBefore: Are you sure you want to deactivate
desativarGestorGeral.descAfter: ? Access to the Report Consolidator will be removed immediately. This action can be reverted by recreating the manager.

cadastrarGestorUnidade.title: Register unit manager
cadastrarGestorUnidade.description: The manager will receive an email to set a password. You can link them now to an existing unit without a manager, or do it later.
cadastrarGestorUnidade.noUnitAvailable: No unit without a manager available. The manager will be registered unlinked.
cadastrarGestorUnidade.successLinked: Manager registered and linked to the unit. Email sent to {{email}}.

transferirProfissional.title: Transfer professional
transferirProfissional.warnAfter: . After the transfer, these patients will be left without a responsible professional. The source unit manager will need to reassign them.
transferirProfissional.success: {{nome}} transferred to {{destino}}. {{count}} patients were left for reassignment at the source.

cadastrarProfissionalConsultorio.title: Register professional
cadastrarProfissionalConsultorio.description: An invitation email will be sent for the professional to set their password.
cadastrarProfissionalConsultorio.fillRequired: Fill in name, email and plan.

institucionais.title: Institutional management
institucionais.subtitle: Contractors, units, unit managers, professionals and general managers.

placeholder.defaultMessage: This section will be built soon.

desvincularGestor.title: Unlink {{gestor}} from {{unidade}}?
desvincularGestor.point1: The manager stays active and can log in normally
desvincularGestor.point2: They will be unassigned (no unit) until linked again
desvincularGestor.point3: The unit will be open, ready to receive another manager
desvincularGestor.point4: This action does not revoke access. To revoke, use the Unit Managers tab

contratante.descCreate: Register a legal entity that contracts MARI.
contratante.descEdit: Update the contractor details. Tax ID is not editable.
contratante.cnpjNotEditable: Not editable. To correct the Tax ID, register a new contractor and transfer the units.
contratante.dataTerminoConfirm: The end date is more than 1 year in the future. Do you want to confirm?

transferirUnidade.title: Transfer unit to another contractor
transferirUnidade.justificativaPlaceholder: E.g.: Change of administrative operator by decision of the city hall.

mudarPlano.title: Change {{nome}}'s plan
mudarPlano.description: The monthly report limit will be updated according to the new plan.

laudoTextos.title: Report Texts
laudoTextos.subtitleBase: Edit the texts shown in the reports.
laudoTextos.variaveisSummary: Available variables (write in brackets, e.g.: [patient name])
laudoTextos.carregarError: Error loading the texts. Reload the page.
laudoTextos.editarDescription: The edit becomes a draft; nothing changes in the report until you publish.
laudoTextos.variavelNaoReconhecida: Unrecognized variable: {{vars}}. In the report, it becomes "(not provided)". Check the legend below.
laudoTextos.publicarConfirmDesc: The draft will replace the published version and will start appearing in new reports.
laudoTextos.descartarConfirmDesc: The unpublished edit will be lost. The published version stays as it is.
laudoTextos.rascunhoSalvo: Draft saved. Publish it to apply it to the report.
laudoTextos.textoPublicado: Text published. It now applies to new reports.

filtros.exportOnlyTooltip: Applied only to exported files. On-screen totals reflect all periods.

reativarAcesso.title: Reactivate access for {{nome}}?
reativarAcesso.bullet1: The professional will be able to log in again with their current password.
reativarAcesso.bullet2: They will see the patients of unit {{unidade}} again.
reativarAcesso.bullet3: There is no need to send a new invitation.

convidarProf.title: Invite professional
convidarProf.description: The professional will receive an email on behalf of the unit to set a password and log in.

trocarGestor.title: Change manager of unit {{unidade}}
trocarGestor.intro: Choose what to do with the current manager before registering the new one.
trocarGestor.optKeep: Keep as a professional of the unit
trocarGestor.warning: The previous manager loses access to the management panel. This action cannot be undone automatically.

planos.savedAsaasError: Plan saved, but there was an error updating the subscriptions in Asaas.
planos.savedAsaasSuccess: Plan saved and {{atualizadas}} subscription(s) updated in Asaas.
planos.savedNoActive: Plan saved. No active subscription in Asaas to update.
planos.savedWithLaudos: Plan updated and report limit applied to current clients.
planos.title: Plans
planos.subtitle: Edit the name, reports/month, price and payment link of each private-practice plan.
planos.priceNewSubscriptions: The price applies to new subscriptions.
planos.priceInfo: The price applies to new subscriptions. Current subscriptions only change if you choose "Adjust all" (then the new value is applied to active charges in Asaas).
planos.paymentLinkHelp: Product link in Asaas — makes it easier to review/edit the charge.
planos.optPreservar: Keep current clients — applies only to new sign-ups/renewals. The {{count}} current client keeps what they already have.
planos.optPreservar_other: Keep current clients — applies only to new sign-ups/renewals. The {{count}} current clients keep what they already have.
planos.optReajustar: Adjust all — applies immediately to the {{count}} current client.
planos.optReajustar_other: Adjust all — applies immediately to the {{count}} current clients.
planos.optReajustarAsaas: The price updates active charges in Asaas (real billing).
planos.confirmReajusteBody: This will change the real billing of the active subscriptions of this plan in Asaas to {{preco}}/month
planos.confirmReajusteTail: . Current clients will start paying the new amount. This action affects billing and does not undo itself.

institucional.reactivateBullet2: Professionals affected by the closure have their access restored automatically
institucional.reactivateWarnPart3: be reactivated — only those who lost access through the closure cascade.
institucional.unitCreatedOpen: Unit created without a manager. Link one later.
institucional.createUnitDesc: Create a unit and assign a manager — new or already registered in the system.
institucional.noManagersAvailable: There are no registered managers available to link. Register a manager first on the "Unit Managers" tab and come back here to create the unit. Alternatively, use the "Register a new manager" option above.
institucional.unitWithoutManagerNote: The unit will be created without a manager. You can link a manager later from the Units or Unit Managers tab.
institucional.linkDescChooseUnit: Choose an open unit to create the link.
institucional.linkDescChooseManager: Choose an available manager to create the link.
institucional.noManagersLoose: No manager available. Register an unassigned manager on the Unit Managers tab.
institucional.emailUniquenessWarning: Emails are unique in the system. If this email is already registered as an admin, professional, manager of another unit, or general manager, creation will be blocked.

usuarios.noAdmins: No administrators registered. This should not happen — please contact support.
usuarios.addAdminDesc: The new admin will receive an email to set their password.
usuarios.uniqueEmailInfo: Each email can have only one profile in the system. If this person already uses MARI as a professional, unit manager, or general manager, they will need to use a different email for administrator access.
usuarios.removeConfirmPrefix: Are you sure you want to remove
usuarios.removeConfirmSuffix: as an administrator? This action cannot be undone.
usuarios.cannotRemoveLast: You cannot remove the last administrator.
usuarios.errEmailExistente: This email is already an administrator.
usuarios.errEmailProfissional: This email is already registered as a professional. Each email can have only one profile — use a different email.
usuarios.errEmailGestorUnidade: This email is already registered as a unit manager. Each email can have only one profile — use a different email.
usuarios.errEmailGestorGeral: This email is already registered as a general manager. Each email can have only one profile — use a different email.
usuarios.errEmailOutro: This email is already in use in the system. Use a different email.
usuarios.fallbackGenerico: The action could not be completed. Please try again shortly.
usuarios.title: Create users
usuarios.subtitle: Register accounts without a password. The system sends a "Set password" link by email.
usuarios.pendingDesc: The original document lists these users as "Admin", but it also mentions "institutional general manager". Confirm with Mari before creating them — the correct profile may be General manager (linked to a unit), rather than platform Admin.
usuarios.accountCreatedToast: Account created and set-password link generated.
usuarios.csvTplLine1: Paste below in the format (one per line, comma-separated):
usuarios.csvTplLine3: Accepted profiles: admin, consultorio, institucional, gestor, gestor_geral
usuarios.csvTplLine4: Accepted plans: inicial, intermediario, profissional (or - if admin)
usuarios.csvTplLine5: Unit: exact unit name (leave - if admin/consultorio)
usuarios.errExpectedFormat: Expected: name, email, profile, plan, unit
usuarios.errUnitRequired: Unit is required for this profile.
usuarios.linksGenerated: "Set password" links generated (use if the email does not arrive):
usuarios.accountCreatedDesc: The user will receive an email with a link to set the password.

reativarGestor.title: Reactivate {{nome}}'s access?
reativarGestor.line1: → The manager will be able to log in again with the current password
reativarGestor.line2: → They will not be automatically linked to any unit
reativarGestor.line3: → To assign them to a unit, go to the Units tab afterward

editarGestor.title: Edit unit manager
editarGestor.emailTooltip: Not editable. To fix it, revoke access and register the manager again with the correct email.

configuracoes.saveSuccess: Name updated. It appears in the greeting and in the menu.
configuracoes.title: Settings
configuracoes.subtitle: Adjust your administrator account details.
configuracoes.identityDesc: The name appears in the greeting and in the menu footer.
configuracoes.emailNote: The login email cannot be edited here.

profissionaisConsultorio.title: Professional Accounts
profissionaisConsultorio.subtitle: Professionals who see patients in private practice with a subscription plan.

revogar.title: Disable {{nome}}'s access?
revogar.bullet1: The professional loses access to the system immediately.
revogar.bullet2: The clinical data they created remains intact.
revogar.bullet3: The authorship stamps on the records are preserved.
revogar.bullet4: This action can be reversed with the "Reactivate access" button.

editarProf.title: Edit professional
editarProf.emailTip: Not editable. To correct the email, revoke access and send a new invitation.
editarProf.crmTip: The CRM is clinical-legal data and can only be changed by the professional in their own profile.

depoimentos.title: Testimonials
depoimentos.subtitle: Approve or reject testimonials submitted by users.

tutoriais.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
tutoriais.title: Tutorials
tutoriais.subtitle: Manage the training videos shown for each user role.
tutoriais.dialogDesc: The video appears on the Tutorial tab of the selected role.
tutoriais.titlePlaceholder: E.g., How to register a patient
tutoriais.descPlaceholder: A short summary of what the video teaches.
tutoriais.keepCurrentHint: (leave empty to keep the current one)
tutoriais.thumbHint: Without a thumbnail, the card shows a default icon.
tutoriais.deleteConfirmNamed: "{{titulo}}" will be removed, along with the video and thumbnail. This action cannot be undone.

revogarGestor.stillLinked: This manager is still linked to the unit.
revogarGestor.stillLinkedNamed: This manager is still linked to the unit "{{unidade}}".
revogarGestor.beforeRevokeHint: Before revoking access, go to the Units tab and use the "Change manager" button for this unit.
revogarGestor.consequence1: → The manager loses access to the system immediately
revogarGestor.consequence3: → This action can be reversed with "Reactivate access"

selectContratante.empty: There are no active contractors registered. Register a contractor before creating the unit.

diagnosticos.lgpdText: All displayed metrics are aggregated and anonymized — there is no name, ID number, medical record, individual glucose values or reports. Aggregated statistical data fall under Article 12 of the LGPD (anonymized data are not considered personal data for the purposes of this law).
diagnosticos.pizzaCaption: Pregnant patients diagnosed by route · {{total}} total
diagnosticos.title: Diagnoses
diagnosticos.subtitle: Aggregated epidemiological metrics — GDM, OVERT DM, treatment and outcomes.
diagnosticos.cardTotalGestantesTip: All pregnant patients registered in the system (with consultation 1 completed), respecting the applied regional filters.
diagnosticos.cardDmgTip: Pregnant patients with a confirmed diagnosis of Gestational Diabetes Mellitus (scenarios 1, 6 and 6b) — Febrasgo criteria.
diagnosticos.cardOvertTip: Overt diabetes (pre-existing, identified during pregnancy, scenario 8): fasting glucose ≥ 126 mg/dL or post-load ≥ 200 mg/dL.
diagnosticos.cardDmgOvertTip: Automatic sum of patients with GDM or OVERT DM — total pregnant patients with diagnosed diabetes.
diagnosticos.cardControlRateTip: Percentage of patients with GDM who achieved adequate glycemic control with diet and exercise alone, without needing referral to an endocrinologist.
diagnosticos.evolDesc: Last 12 months — registered pregnant patients and confirmed diagnoses.
diagnosticos.igMediaDesc: Mean gestational age (weeks) at which the diagnosis was confirmed, by route.
diagnosticos.historicoTitle: History of GDM in a previous pregnancy
diagnosticos.patientsWithHistoryTip: Pregnant patients who reported a GDM diagnosis in a previous pregnancy at initial registration.
diagnosticos.dmgAgainTip: Among patients with a prior history, how many were confirmed with GDM in this pregnancy.
diagnosticos.recurrenceRateTip: Of the patients who had GDM in a previous pregnancy, how many were confirmed with GDM here. The others did not develop GDM this time, have not yet been confirmed, or were classified as OVERT DM. Expected recurrence in the literature: ~40–70%.
diagnosticos.emAcompanhamentoTip: Patients with active follow-up in MARI (not yet closed by delivery, miscarriage, insulinization or dropout).
diagnosticos.encerradosSub: delivery, miscarriage, insulinization, did not return…
diagnosticos.encerradosTip: Total follow-ups closed for any reason. Breakdown by reason in the chart below.
diagnosticos.naoRetornaramTip: Patients whose follow-up was closed because they did not return — an adherence/dropout indicator.
diagnosticos.igEncaminhamento: Mean GA at referral to endocrinologist
diagnosticos.igEncaminhamentoTip: Mean gestational age at which patients who needed insulin were referred to the endocrinologist. Reference: the earlier, the better the prognosis.
diagnosticos.funilDesc: Total → GDM → Diet only → Insulin started → Insulin sufficient → Add endocrinologist.
diagnosticos.controlOnlyDietTip: Patients with GDM who achieved adequate glycemic control without needing insulin — the ideal scenario, fully managed by the OB/GYN.
diagnosticos.needEndocrinoSub: {{pct}} of patients with GDM · the OB/GYN remains the lead of prenatal care.
diagnosticos.needEndocrinoTip: Patients who needed to start insulin (scenario 7) and were referred to the endocrinologist. The OB/GYN remains the lead of prenatal care; MARI ends glycemic management at this point.
diagnosticos.laudosVolumeTitle: Volume of reports generated per month
diagnosticos.laudosVolumeMeta: last 12 months · updated in real time
diagnosticos.laudosVolumeDesc: Each report corresponds to a completed consultation in MARI. The series may appear at zero while the report history is not yet populated (e.g., a recently migrated base or a period with no completed appointments).
diagnosticos.consultorioGroupDesc: GDM rate among pregnant patients seen by independent professionals (with no institutional link).
diagnosticos.institucionalGroupDesc: GDM rate by unit — health centers, hospitals and partner clinics.

dicas.emptyActiveError: Slot {{slots}}: cannot activate an empty tip.
dicas.title: Dashboard tips
dicas.subtitle: Edit the phrases shown in the "Tip of the day" card on the institutional dashboard. One active tip is drawn per day.
dicas.noneActive: No active tips — the dashboard will use default phrases.
dicas.textPlaceholder: Type the phrase that will appear in the 'Tip of the day' card…

linhaUnidade.transferDisabledTip: Reactivate the current contractor or wait for reactivation to transfer.

encerrarContratante.successToast_one: Contractor {{nome}} closed. {{count}} professional had access revoked.
encerrarContratante.successToast_other: Contractor {{nome}} closed. {{count}} professionals had access revoked.
encerrarContratante.title: Close contractor
encerrarContratante.aboutToClose: You are about to close the contract with
encerrarContratante.affectProfessionals_one: {{count}} professional with access revoked (includes unit managers)
encerrarContratante.affectProfessionals_other: {{count}} professionals with access revoked (includes unit managers)
encerrarContratante.affectManagers: Links with general managers associated with this contractor are removed
encerrarContratante.preservePatients: Patients under follow-up keep their clinical data intact
encerrarContratante.preserveAuthorship: Authorship stamps on medical records preserved
encerrarContratante.preserveHistory: History of exams and reports is immutable
encerrarContratante.reversibleNote: This action is REVERSIBLE — you can reactivate the contractor later.
encerrarContratante.reasonPlaceholder: E.g.: Contract not renewed after quality audit.
encerrarContratante.confirmCheckbox: I confirm that I understand the impact of this action.

revogarConsultorio.title: Revoke access for {{nome}}?
revogarConsultorio.description: The professional will immediately lose access to MARI. Clinical data remains preserved. Remember to cancel the subscription in the Asaas panel if it exists.
revogarConsultorio.asaasAck: I am aware that I will need to cancel the subscription in Asaas manually, if applicable.

exportar.timeoutMsg: Export too large. Apply period or account type filters to reduce the volume.
exportar.previewUnavailable: Export unavailable in showcase mode. Access /admin with a real login.
exportar.csvOnlySpecific: CSV available only for specific tables (users, professionals by state, GDM by city, metrics by unit). For the full report, use Excel or PDF.
exportar.noDataForFilters: No data for the applied filters.
exportar.title: Export reports
exportar.subtitle: Generate consolidated files respecting the filters applied below.

completeProfile.title: Complete your professional profile
completeProfile.subtitle: We need a few details to set up your account.
completeProfile.saveError: Error saving profile. Please try again.

invite.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
invite.passwordMinError: The password must be at least 6 characters.
invite.invalidDesc: The link may be incorrect or the invitation was canceled.
invite.expiredDesc: Request a new one from your unit manager.
invite.usedTitle: This invitation has already been used.
invite.usedDesc: If you already have an account, log in.
invite.emailInUseTitle: This email is already in use on MARI
invite.emailInUseP1: You already have a MARI account using this email (likely as a private practice professional). On MARI, each email belongs to a single usage model — private practice OR institutional unit.
invite.emailInUseP2: ask the person who sent the invitation to resend it using a different email — it can be a secondary professional or personal email. You can keep both accounts in parallel, each with its own care model.
invite.fillDataSubtitle: Fill in your details to access the system.
